---
name: Damaged or unexpected save
about: A save was damaged or didn't behave as expected after using Dragonscribe
title: "[save] "
labels: save-issue
---

**What did you do in Dragonscribe?**
(e.g. converted "Dawn" to Custom, set character "Aemilius" to Custom)

**What happened?**
(world won't load, character can't join, an edit didn't stick, etc.)

**What did you expect to happen?**

**Do you still have the backup?**
Dragonscribe writes a timestamped copy to an `editor_backups` folder next to the
save before changing it. Please don't delete it; it's the fastest way to
recover and to see what changed.

**Details that help**
- World mode shown in the app before/after:
- Character compatibility before/after:
- Was the game fully closed when you edited? Yes / No
- App version (window title or `selfcheck.txt`):
